name: Attention Debt
description: The attention system is paying interest on too many unfinished loops.
life_effect: The person may mistake cognitive overload for lack of destiny or lack of talent.

name: Ambition-Body Mismatch
description: The ambition system asks for a speed the body cannot sustainably fund.
life_effect: If the body is not treated as part of the simulation, the future branch becomes fragile.

name: Rest As Forbidden Value
description: Rest has been coded as falling behind rather than recovering agency.
life_effect: The person may only permit rest after breakdown, making rupture more likely.

name: Small Energy Rebuild Window
description: A lower-energy intervention can rebuild agency without demanding a full life overhaul.
life_effect: Small repeatable experiments are better than heroic transformation attempts.
